name: ai-ready-engine
description: MCP server for AI Ready Suite — assessment, audit, and library scout engines.

scripts.build:all: npm run build:compile && npm run build:obfuscate && npm run build:copy
scripts.build:obfuscate: npx javascript-obfuscator ./index.js --output ./dist/index.js --control-flow-flattening true --dead-code-injection true --string-array-encoding base64 --string-array-threshold 0.8 --self-defending true --disable-console-output true && npx javascript-obfuscator ./engine/assessment.js --output ./dist/engine/assessment.js --control-flow-flattening true --dead-code-injection true --string-array-encoding base64 --string-array-threshold 0.8 --self-defending true && npx javascript-obfuscator ./engine/auditor.js --output ./dist/engine/auditor.js --control-flow-flattening true --dead-code-injection true --string-array-encoding base64 --string-array-threshold 0.8 --self-defending true && npx javascript-obfuscator ./engine/pipeline.js --output ./dist/engine/pipeline.js --control-flow-flattening true --dead-code-injection true --string-array-encoding base64 --string-array-threshold 0.8 && npx javascript-obfuscator ./engine/interaction.js --output ./dist/engine/interaction.js --control-flow-flattening true --dead-code-injection true --string-array-encoding base64 --string-array-threshold 0.8 --self-defending true && npx javascript-obfuscator ./engine/activation.js --output ./dist/engine/activation.js --control-flow-flattening true --dead-code-injection true --string-array-encoding base64 --string-array-threshold 0.8
scripts.postbuild: rm -rf ./dist/schema && cp -r ./schema ./dist/schema && echo 'Postbuild: schema copied to dist/'
